speech_recognizer_setup.message0: Initialize the speech recognition module %1 I2C address %2
speech_recognizer_setup.tooltip: Initialize the speech recognition module, the default I2C address is 0x30

speech_recognizer_set_timeout.tooltip: Set recognition timeout (milliseconds), invalid for automatic recognition mode

speech_recognizer_add_keyword.tooltip: Add speech recognition keywords, up to 50 words, each word up to 50 bytes

speech_recognizer_recognize.tooltip: Perform speech recognition and return the recognized keyword index (>=0). If not recognized, return -1. Need to be called in a loop

speech_recognizer_event_handler.tooltip: Perform the corresponding action when the specified event occurs

speech_recognizer_check_result.message0: The recognition result %1 is equal to %2
speech_recognizer_check_result.tooltip: Check whether the recognition result is equal to the specified index
